_comment: Match rules for dim_person. Single source today (Salesforce Contact). Rules prepared for future NetSuite/HubSpot person entities.

blocking._comment: Block by email domain before pairwise comparison.

rules._comment: Rule 1 — Deterministic: same email = same person.
Rule 2 — Probabilistic: full name similarity + same account company. Catches 'John Smith' vs 'J. Smith' when tied to same company.
